text.title: AWS VPC Three-Tier Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules every application of `AWS VPC Three-Tier` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: VPC MUST have public + private (app) + data subnets per AZ. Workloads MUST live in the private (app) tier; databases in the data tier; only ALB + NAT in public.
rule.rationale: Mixing tiers eliminates the defence-in-depth value; three-tier is the auditable web baseline.

rule.statement: Security groups MUST be defined by role: `alb-sg` (inbound 443 from 0.0.0.0/0), `app-sg` (inbound from alb-sg only), `data-sg` (inbound from app-sg only). Wildcard SGs forbidden.
rule.rationale: Role-based SGs eliminate inbound 0.0.0.0/0 in app + data tiers; wildcard SGs leak across services.

rule.statement: Production three-tier VPC MUST span ≥ 2 AZs; ALB + NAT per AZ; RDS Multi-AZ.
rule.rationale: Single-AZ three-tier is a partial fix; Multi-AZ closes the AZ-outage vector.

rule.statement: Data subnet MUST NOT have NAT route; outbound internet from data tier is forbidden.

rationale.source: AWS VPC Design Best Practices; PCI-DSS 4.0

rule.rationale: DB outbound internet = exfil path; no-NAT data tier closes it; managed services (S3 / Secrets) reach via VPC endpoints.

rule.statement: Direct inbound from public to data tier MUST be denied at SG + NACL. Public-to-private allowed only via ALB; private-to-data only via app-sg.
rule.rationale: Cross-tier shortcuts collapse the architecture into a flat VPC; explicit denies enforce the boundary.

rule.statement: ALB listener MUST be HTTPS (443) with SSL policy `ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-2021-06`; HTTP (80) MUST redirect to HTTPS.
rule.rationale: HTTP listeners leak credentials in transit; TLS 1.3 disables weak ciphers.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
